questions.question_text: You have caught up with the moped. There is no traffic behind you. Which actions are correct?

answers.1: I move out towards the centre line to overtake the moped.
answers.4: I remain behind the moped for the time being.

questions.question_text: You are travelling at about 40 km/h and will continue straight ahead at the intersection. Which actions are correct?

answers.2: I stop before the pedestrian crossing.
answers.3: I pay particular attention to the traffic ahead.

questions.question_text: You are driving at about 40 km/h and are going straight ahead at the intersection. What do you do?
You are driving at about 50 km/h when you suddenly see an emergency vehicle behind you. What do you do?
What should you pay particular attention to here?
You want to overtake the slowly moving car ahead. What do you do here?
You are driving at about 50 km/h. There is no traffic behind you. What do you do?
You want to turn right at the intersection, like the car ahead. It has stopped. What should you pay particular attention to?
The car on the left has stopped. You must continue straight ahead. What do you do?
You are driving at about 30 to 40 km/h, the same speed as the driver ahead. What do you do?
You need to continue straight ahead. What do you do?
You have caught up with the car ahead. It is travelling at about 50 km/h. What do you do?
You need to drive through this town. What do you do?
What should you pay particular attention to here?
You are driving at about 40 km/h and are going straight ahead at the intersection. What do you do?
You are driving at 40 km/h and are going straight ahead at the intersection. What do you do?
You are driving at about 40 km/h, the same speed as the car ahead. You must continue straight ahead. What do you do?
You want to turn right at this intersection. What do you do?
You want to turn right at this intersection. There are no cyclists or pedestrians behind you on the cycle path. What do you do?
You are driving at about 80 km/h and must continue straight ahead. What do you do?
You are driving at about 80 km/h and are about to enter the motorway. What do you do?
You have got out of the red car. Which rule applies here?

answers.2: I may leave the car here for 2-3 minutes.

questions.question_text: You have got out of the red car. Which rule applies here?

answers.2: I may leave the car here for 2-3 minutes.
answers.3: Stopping and parking on this side of the road are prohibited.

questions.question_text: You are driving at about 30 km/h. What do you do?
Which speed limit should you pay particular attention to here?
